Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to a PDF file. &IsAuthorized = SecGAMIsAuthByFunctionalityKey.Udp(!'<Check_Is_Authenticated>') If &IsAuthorized
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Lançamento Notas Fiscais"
//Report Template Source Header if &Context.EmpCod = 0 loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan
&AddressLine1 = &Today.ToFormattedString() + ' ' + &Time.Trim() //FilLogNro.Trim() + ' - ' + FilBai.Trim() + ', '+ FilCidCodNomUfe.Trim()
&AddressLine2 = FilFonNum.Trim() if not FilEml.IsEmpty() if not &AddressLine2.IsEmpty() &AddressLine2 += ' / ' Endif &AddressLine2 += FilEml.Trim() Endif Exit EndFor
Print printTitle End
Do 'PrintFilters'
Do 'PrintColumnTitles'
Do 'PrintData'
Do 'PrintFooter'
EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'PrintFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &NfeNum.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterNfeNum EndIf If not &NfePedCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterNfePedCod EndIf If not &NfeCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterNfeCod EndIf If not &NfeProTer.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeProTerValueDescription = &NfeProTer.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterNfeProTer EndIf If not &ModCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterModCod EndIf If not &FilCod.IsEmpty()
print printBlockFilterFilCod EndIf If not &NfeDtaEms.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterNfeDtaEms EndIf If not &NfeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &NfeDtaEms_To_Description = format('%1 (%2)', "Em.", " - ") print printBlockFilterNfeDtaEms_To EndIf If not &NfeSts.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeStsValueDescription = &NfeSts.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterNfeSts EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz1.IsEmpty() &NfeCliRaz = &NfeCliRaz1 print printBlockFilterNfeCliRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod1.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod1 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai1.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeEntSai1ValueDescription = &NfeEntSai1.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeEntSaiValueDescription = &FilterNfeEntSai1ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeEntSai EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj1.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj1 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCnpj EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot1.IsEmpty() &NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot1 print printBlockFilterNfeVlrTot EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod1.IsEmpty() &NfeLctCod = &NfeLctCod1 print printBlockFilterNfeLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF1.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF1 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCidUF EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen1.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeRctPen1ValueDescription = &NfeRctPen1.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeRctPenValueDescription = &FilterNfeRctPen1ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeRctPen EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz2.IsEmpty() &NfeCliRaz = &NfeCliRaz2 print printBlockFilterNfeCliRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod2.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod2 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai2.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeEntSai2ValueDescription = &NfeEntSai2.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeEntSaiValueDescription = &FilterNfeEntSai2ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeEntSai EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj2.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj2 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCnpj EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot2.IsEmpty() &NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot2 print printBlockFilterNfeVlrTot EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod2.IsEmpty() &NfeLctCod = &NfeLctCod2 print printBlockFilterNfeLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF2.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF2 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCidUF EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen2.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeRctPen2ValueDescription = &NfeRctPen2.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeRctPenValueDescription = &FilterNfeRctPen2ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeRctPen EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz3.IsEmpty() &NfeCliRaz = &NfeCliRaz3 print printBlockFilterNfeCliRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod3.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod3 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai3.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeEntSai3ValueDescription = &NfeEntSai3.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeEntSaiValueDescription = &FilterNfeEntSai3ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeEntSai EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj3.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj3 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCnpj EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot3.IsEmpty() &NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot3 print printBlockFilterNfeVlrTot EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod3.IsEmpty() &NfeLctCod = &NfeLctCod3 print printBlockFilterNfeLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF3.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF3 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCidUF EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen3.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeRctPen3ValueDescription = &NfeRctPen3.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeRctPenValueDescription = &FilterNfeRctPen3ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeRctPen EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 4 &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(4) &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliRaz4.IsEmpty() &NfeCliRaz = &NfeCliRaz4 print printBlockFilterNfeCliRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCod4.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCod = &NfeCliCod4 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeEntSai4.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeEntSai4ValueDescription = &NfeEntSai4.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeEntSaiValueDescription = &FilterNfeEntSai4ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeEntSai EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCnpj4.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCnpj = &NfeCliCnpj4 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCnpj EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeVlrTot4.IsEmpty() &NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot4 print printBlockFilterNfeVlrTot EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeLctCod4.IsEmpty() &NfeLctCod = &NfeLctCod4 print printBlockFilterNfeLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeCliCidUF4.IsEmpty() &NfeCliCidUF = &NfeCliCidUF4 print printBlockFilterNfeCliCidUF EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen4.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &NfeRctPen4.IsEmpty() &FilterNfeRctPen4ValueDescription = &NfeRctPen4.EnumerationDescription()
&FilterNfeRctPenValueDescription = &FilterNfeRctPen4ValueDescription print printBlockFilterNfeRctPen EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each order EmpCod FilCod (NfeNum) when &OrderedBy = 1 order NfeNum when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeNum) when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = True order NfeDtaEms when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeDtaEms) when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = True order NfeVlrTot when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeVlrTot) when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = True order NfeCliCidUF when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (NfeCliCidUF) when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = True
using DSwwNotas(&NfeNum, &NfePedCod, &NfeCod, &NfeProTer, &ModCod, &FilCod , &NfeDtaEms, &NfeDtaEms_To, &NfeSts, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &NfeCliRaz1, &NfeCliCod1 , &NfeEntSai1, &NfeCliCnpj1, &NfeVlrTot1, &NfeLctCod1, &NfeCliCidUF1, &NfeRctPen1 , &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &NfeCliRaz2, &NfeCliCod2, &NfeEntSai2, &NfeCliCnpj2 , &NfeVlrTot2, &NfeLctCod2, &NfeCliCidUF2, &NfeRctPen2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3 , &NfeCliRaz3, &NfeCliCod3, &NfeEntSai3, &NfeCliCnpj3, &NfeVlrTot3, &NfeLctCod3 , &NfeCliCidUF3, &NfeRctPen3, &DynamicFiltersEnabled4, &DynamicFiltersSelector4, &NfeCliRaz4, &NfeCliCod4 , &NfeEntSai4, &NfeCliCnpj4, &NfeVlrTot4, &NfeLctCod4, &NfeCliCidUF4, &NfeRctPen4) if NfeCliRaz.Length() > 40 &gridNfeCliRaz = substr(upper(NfeCliCodRaz),1,45) + '...' Else &gridNfeCliRaz = NfeCliCodRaz EndIF &NfeStsDescription = NfeSts.EnumerationDescription() &NfeEntSaiDescription = NfeEntSai.EnumerationDescription()
&gridNfeLctNom = trim(str(NfeLctCod)) + '-'+ Substr(NfeLctNom, 1, 15)
Do 'BeforePrintLine' print printBlockLines_data Do 'AfterPrintLine' EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"wwNotasGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwNotasGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwNotasGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFENUM" &NfeNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPEDCOD" &NfePedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECOD" &NfeCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPROTER" &NfeProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MODCOD" &ModCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEDTAEMS" &NfeDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFESTS" &NfeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforePrintLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterPrintLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintFooter'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
